feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two header-related UI updates and affected files/components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing precomputed summaries for numerous frontend components and pages.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS setup defining light/dark theme CSS variables and base styles.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point mounting the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app configuring routes, providers, global header, mini-player, and onboarding redirect.
frontend/src/components/auth/InterestsCh: Component rendering a scrollable grid of interest checkboxes with selection handling.
frontend/src/components/categories/Categ: Component showing selectable category buttons linked to feed filter state.
frontend/src/components/feed/AudioCard.t: Audio card UI with playback, like/dislike, metadata, and expandable comments.
frontend/src/components/feed/CommentsPan: Scrollable comments list displaying author, timestamp, and text.
frontend/src/components/language/Languag: Popover-based multi-select for languages with search, custom entry, and selection display.
frontend/src/components/layout/BrandingB: Displays a centered branding banner with logo, slogan, and a top-left dropdown, with fallback text if the logo fails.
Provides a dropdown navigation menu with links to informational and policy pages.
frontend/src/components/layout/FloatingB: Shows a floating button that returns to the feed, hidden when the mini-player is active.
frontend/src/components/layout/FloatingL: Implements a floating popover to filter feed content by languages, including custom language entry, hidden when the mini-player is active.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Renders the main site header with navigation menu, centered logo, and action buttons like upload and account.
frontend/src/components/layout/PrimaryNa: Displays primary navigation buttons for Feed, Explore, and Upload, highlighting the active route.
frontend/src/components/onboarding/Onboa: A multi-step onboarding flow with progress, icons, descriptions, and navigation controls for next, back, skip, and finish.
frontend/src/components/player/MiniPlaye: Shows a bottom mini audio player with playback controls, progress bar, volume, and close button when an item is active.
frontend/src/components/search/SearchBar: Provides a search input that updates feed search state and auto-selects a default language on focus or change.
frontend/src/components/upload/AudioSour: Handles audio upload or recording with MediaRecorder, manages recording state, cleanup, and passes the resulting file upward.
frontend/src/components/upload/CategoryP: Provides a searchable dropdown to select or create categories, excluding the 'All' category.
frontend/src/components/upload/UploadFor: Implements the audio upload form with validation, saving drafts, and handling title, description, category, audio, thumbnail, and languages.
frontend/src/components/upload/useAudioD: Validates audio file duration by loading metadata and flags files longer than three hours.
frontend/src/constants/categories.ts: Defines the fixed list of categories, including 'All' and several content-specific options.
frontend/src/constants/interests.ts: Builds a combined interests list from categories (excluding 'All') plus additional interest tags.
frontend/src/constants/languages.ts: Exports a comprehensive ISO 639-1 language list plus a 'No language (music)' option.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor and refreshes dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCustomLanguages.ts: Manages custom user-defined languages with localStorage persistence and merging with built‑in languages.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and provider for managing Internet Identity authentication using AuthClient, including login state and stored identities.
frontend/src/hooks/useOnboarding.ts: Manages onboarding completion state with localStorage persistence and exposes mark and reset helpers.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file reserved for future React Query integration.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind base styles and theme variables for light and dark modes, plus utility classes.
frontend/src/lib/draftFeedItems.ts: Handles saving, loading, and clearing locally stored draft audio items, including file-to-dataURL conversion.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a className utility combining clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/mock/mockAudio.ts: Defines mock audio item and comment types and provides a static list of sample audio content.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Displays placeholder content describing the SPEAKR platform.
frontend/src/pages/AuthPage.tsx: Implements UI-only login and registration forms with validation and interest selection.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Shows placeholder contact information for the SPEAKR site.
frontend/src/pages/ExplorePage.tsx: Renders category cards allowing users to filter the feed and navigate back to the homepage.
frontend/src/pages/FeedPage.tsx: Combines mock and draft audio items, applies search and filter logic, and displays the resulting feed.
frontend/src/pages/HelpPage.tsx: Provides placeholder text for the upcoming FAQ and help center.
frontend/src/pages/OnboardingPage.tsx: Renders the onboarding wizard and navigates home when completed or skipped.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPage.tsx: Displays a placeholder privacy policy page with upcoming content notice.
frontend/src/pages/TermsPage.tsx: Shows a placeholder terms of service page with text indicating content will be added.
frontend/src/pages/UploadPage.tsx: Wraps and displays the UploadForm within a full‑height container.
frontend/src/player/PlayerProvider.tsx: Provides audio playback context with play, pause, seek, volume, and state management via an HTMLAudioElement.
frontend/src/state/feedFilters.ts: Zustand store managing feed filters including search, category, language selection, and default language logic.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending theme colors, typography, animations, and container settings.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing features, requests, issues, and version info for build planning.
